title: Java Native Interface Specification: 1 - Introduction
quote: The JNI is a native programming interface. It allows Java code that runs inside a Java Virtual Machine (VM) to interoperate with applications and libraries written in other programming languages, such as C, C++, and assembly. Many of the uses of JNI can be achieved with the newer Foreign Function & Memory API (FFM), which should be preferred over JNI.

title: JEP 454: Foreign Function & Memory API
quote: The API enables Java programs to call native libraries and process native data without the brittleness and danger of JNI.

title: Jextract Guide
quote: The jextract tool parses header (.h) files of native libraries, and generates Java code, called bindings, which use the Foreign Function and Memory API (FFM API) under the hood.

title: FFI - The Rustonomicon
quote: Rust guarantees that the layout of a struct is compatible with the platform’s representation in C only if the #[repr(C)] attribute is applied to it.

title: jni-rs
quote: This project provides complete JNI bindings for Rust, allowing to implement native Java methods for JVM and Android in Rust.

title: Java Native Access (JNA)
quote: JNA provides Java programs easy access to native shared libraries without writing anything but Java code - no JNI or native code is required. While significant attention has been paid to performance, correctness and ease of use take priority.

title: cbindgen
quote: cbindgen creates C/C++11 headers for Rust libraries which expose a public C API.

title: cargo-c
quote: cargo applet to build and install C-ABI compatible dynamic and static libraries.

title: Alloy
quote: Alloy consists of a number of crates that provide a range of functionality essential for interfacing with any Ethereum-based blockchain.

title: Getting Started - alloy
quote: High Performance: Optimized primitives with up to 60% faster U256 operations and 10x faster ABI encoding.

title: Transactions - alloy
quote: EIP-4844 transactions (TxType = 3) are specific to Ethereum mainnet.

title: Web3j
quote: Web3j is a lightweight, highly modular, reactive, type safe Java and Android library for working with Smart Contracts and integrating with clients (nodes) on the Ethereum network.

title: Web3j documentation
quote: Complete implementation of Ethereum's JSON-RPC client API over HTTP and IPC.

title: Besu Ethereum Client
quote: Besu is an Apache 2.0 licensed, MainNet compatible, Ethereum client written in Java.

title: Tuweni: Apache Core Libraries for Java (& Kotlin)
quote: Tuweni is a set of libraries and other tools to aid development of blockchain and other decentralized software in Java and other JVM languages.
